task_completion.description: Locate and open Ernest Reed's employee record in the Odoo Employees app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows Ernest Reed's employee profile in the Odoo interface.

task_completion.description: Update the Job Title field to 'Senior Research Analyst'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Job Title' field (typically located right below the employee's name at the top of the profile) displays 'Senior Research Analyst'.

task_completion.description: Update the Department and Job Position fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Department' field shows 'Research & Development' and the 'Job Position' field shows 'Experienced Developer'.

task_completion.description: Update the Manager and Coach fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Manager' field shows 'Marc Demo' and the 'Coach' field shows 'Tina Williamson'.

task_completion.description: Update the Work Phone and Work Email fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Work Phone' field shows '+1 (650) 555-0199' (or similar formatting like '6505550199') and the 'Work Email' field shows 'ernest.reed@yourcompany.example.com'.
The employee record is saved, indicated by the absence of unsaved changes indicators (like a 'Discard' button) or the presence of a saved/read-only state with all the new information visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Odoo application, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show genuine Odoo UI elements (menus, form fields, buttons) being interacted with, not a text editor or mocked UI.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a database client to modify the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using tools like psql, pgAdmin, or terminal database queries to update the employee record.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires updating Ernest Reed's employee record in Odoo 17. Expected values to verify: Job Title: 'Senior Research Analyst', Department: 'Research & Development', Job Position: 'Experienced Developer', Manager: 'Marc Demo', Coach: 'Tina Williamson', Work Phone: '+1 (650) 555-0199' (or '6505550199'), Work Email: 'ernest.reed@yourcompany.example.com'. The initial state of Ernest Reed was Department: Professional Services, Job Position: Consultant. Verify that these specific fields have been updated to the expected values in the Odoo UI.
